name: Pacific Lime And Cement Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 3% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (0.9× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$0.3900, stop A$0.3366, target A$0.5502 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
